title: Gaia Combination Edge
description: Schema for a directed edge (prerequisite relationship) between two skills in the Gaia DAG.

edgeType.description: The relationship type between source and target.

condition.description: Optional condition that must be met for this edge to be active.

levelFloor.description: Minimum level the source skill must be at for this edge to apply.

evidenceRefs.description: References to evidence entries that support this edge relationship.
